title: Publication Figure Generation: 8 Figures from Pre-Computed Circuit Motif Spectroscopy Data
summary: Demo notebook generates 8 publication-quality figures from pre-computed circuit motif spectroscopy data. Figures include: motif catalog with pipeline schematic, FFL Z-score boxplots across 8 capability domains, t-SNE clustering (4 feature sets, best NMI=0.855), weighted feature heatmap with dendrograms, variance decomposition (shared R²=93%), ablation impact (FFL-hub 4.3-9.3x vs controls), confusion matrices, and 4-node FFL containment analysis. All figures use Okabe-Ito colorblind-safe palette. Data is a curated 104KB subset from 4 dependency experiments. Notebook runs in ~2 minutes at 100 DPI.
